response.step_by_step_log: Identified the video as part of the 'hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE: Chromatic Future' concert. Recognized the song as 'Break it Down' by Vestia Zeta. Searched for the lyrics to 'Break it Down' by Vestia Zeta and identified it as an original song with lyrics primarily in English. Structured the scene to separate the initial skit from the musical performance. Provided the main refrain of the lyrics for the performance segment.
response.global_summary: A performance segment from the 'hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE: Chromatic Future' concert, featuring the song 'Break it Down' performed by Hololive Indonesia members.

scenes.description: Skit and dialogue segment involving Hololive Indonesia members before the performance.
Musical performance of 'Break it Down' by Hololive Indonesia members.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Everything was easy
I did it all alone
So effortlessly
I spread my wings and let my magic unfold
Got all problems solved
Without any setbacks
There is nothing uncontrolled
There's no way I can begin
Dream life that I need to win
I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces
I know I gotta soar a little higher
Hope all turns to be the things I desire
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Everything was easy
I did it all alone
So effortlessly
I spread my wings and let my magic unfold
Got all problems solved
Without any setbacks
There is nothing uncontrolled
There's no way I can begin
Dream life that I need to win
I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces
I know I gotta soar a little higher
Hope all turns to be the things I desire
